title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
tmdbOverview: Duped and sold to a brothel, a young woman fearlessly reclaims her power, using underworld connections to preside over the world she was once a pawn in.
synopsis: Gangubai Kathiawadi (2022) is a crime, drama and history film from India. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a MA15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
